title: Notifications - Device disconnected OFF
scenario: No "Device is disconnected" notification appears when notification toggle is disabled in Poly Lens Menu > General > Notifications & Device Alerts and headset is turned off with app in background
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to Poly Lens Menu → General → Notifications & Device Alerts.
3. Locate the 'Device Disconnected' notification toggle and ensure it is turned OFF.
4. Pair and connect a supported Poly Bluetooth headset to the Android device.
5. Press the Power button on the headset to turn it OFF.
6. Immediately press the Home button on the Android device to send the Poly Studio Mobile app to the background.
7. Observe the Android notification shade for any incoming notifications.
expected: No 'Device is disconnected' notification appears in the Android notification shade after turning off the headset while the app is in the background.
